description_long: This house features a multi-level design with a combination of gable and flat roofs, giving it a distinctive and modern appearance. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a single door, flanked by symmetrical windows and a double garage. On one side, there is a rounded bay window structure extending vertically across two stories, adding architectural interest. The rear and side elevations reveal a small balcony with a wooden railing and additional windows, providing outdoor space and natural light. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with brickwork on the lower level and smooth siding above. The overall structure suggests a spacious, upscale urban residence with multiple living areas and ample window arrangements.
description: A modern, multi-story house with gable and flat roofs, large windows, a bay window, and a front entry with a double garage. The exterior combines brick and smooth siding, with a balcony and varied window arrangements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical bay window, multiple stories, and a mix of brick and siding.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the small balcony with a wooden railing and a single window below.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entry door, double garage, symmetrical windows, and gable roofs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the bay window and flat-roofed section visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and large rectangular panes
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with a small overhang, flanked by windows and adjacent to a double garage; no porch or columns visible.
